title: Salty Gooey Egyptian Barbeque Sauce Wood-Fired-Bake
description: A festive Egyptian dish featuring barbeque sauce, wood-fired-bake, and a gooey salty touch. Perfect for a special occasion or dinner party.
instructions: Mix together barbeque sauce, garlic powder, cumin powder, paprika, and salt in a bowl.
Brush the mixture onto the pita bread slices and place on a baking stone.
Drizzle coconut oil over the bread slices and sprinkle black sesame seeds and pine nuts on top.
Transfer the baking stone to the preheated oven and bake for 10 minutes.
Remove the bread slices from the oven and sprinkle with fresh cilantro.
Drizzle lemon juice over the bread slices and sprinkle with honey.
Return the bread slices to the oven for an additional 5 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the bread slices from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
Cut the bread slices into triangles or squares and serve hot.
Garnish with additional fresh cilantro if desired.
